reference_basis: official and public meteorological radar provider references

pipeline_context.quality_goal: smooth transparent rain/snow fields comparable to Rainbow.ai map overlays
pipeline_context.provider_failure_policy: provider failures are warnings unless every provider fails
pipeline_context.source_cadence_note: The app-facing layer exposes 15-minute offsets through 120 minutes. Radar providers may update more frequently or less frequently by region; global fallback is NOAA GFS hourly forecast data interpolated to those display offsets.
